summary: System Health Dashboard testing complete: Backend API 9/10 tests passed (90%), Frontend UI fully verified. All key features working correctly.

console_warnings: Mixed Content warning for /api/notifications/ using HTTP - pre-existing issue not related to System Health feature

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/system-health requires authentication (returns 403 without token)
Backend: GET /api/system-health requires admin role (returns 403 for non-admin user testref@test.com)
Backend: GET /api/system-health returns 200 for admin user (testopt@example.com)
Backend: Response has overall_status, total_checks, healthy, warnings, errors, avg_uptime, checked_at, categories, checks fields
Backend: Response categories include data_ingestion, api_integrations, core_systems, infrastructure
Backend: Each check has name, category, status (healthy/warning/error), last_success, message, uptime fields
Backend: Data Ingestion shows Opportunity Feed, Amazon Scraper, Google Trends Enrichment, Score Recomputation, Product Data Freshness
Backend: API Integrations shows TikTok API, AliExpress Data Source, Meta Ad Library, CJ Dropshipping, Zendrop
Backend: Core Systems shows Product Scoring Engine, Opportunity Feed Generation, Ad Blueprint Generator, Store Launch Pipeline
Backend: Infrastructure shows MongoDB, Stripe Payments, Job Scheduler, Job Queue Worker
Frontend: SystemHealthDashboard renders at /admin/health for admin user
Frontend: Overall banner shows Platform Status with healthy/warnings/errors counts
Frontend: Stats row shows 18 Total Checks, 9 Healthy, 5 Warnings, 4 Errors
Frontend: Data Ingestion category section displays correctly (data-testid='category-data_ingestion')
Frontend: API Integrations category section displays correctly (data-testid='category-api_integrations')
Frontend: Core Systems category section displays correctly (data-testid='category-core_systems')
Frontend: Infrastructure category section displays correctly (data-testid='category-infrastructure')
Frontend: Refresh button works (data-testid='refresh-health-btn')
Frontend: Non-admin user (testref@test.com) correctly redirected to /dashboard when accessing /admin/health
Frontend: Navigation sidebar has 'System Health' link in adminNavigation array (href='/admin/health')
skipped_tests: test_health_requires_admin_role - Could not create new non-admin user via signup (signup endpoint returned 404). However, manually tested with existing user testref@test.com - 403 response confirmed working.

success_rate.backend: 90% (9/10 tests passed, 1 skipped due to signup endpoint)

context_for_next_testing_agent: System Health Dashboard feature verified: Backend endpoint GET /api/system-health (AUTH + ADMIN required) returns 18 health checks across 4 categories. Current platform status: 9 healthy, 5 warnings, 4 errors, 51% avg uptime. Frontend renders at /admin/health using AdminRoute protection. Sidebar navigation includes 'System Health' link in Administration section (visible when scrolled). Non-admin users are redirected to /dashboard. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_system_health_api.py

response_structure.overall_status: error (when any checks have error status)

ui_components.overall_banner: data-testid='overall-banner' - Shows Platform Status with stats
